prompt: {"type":"black-and-white fantasy manga page","style":"high-detail seinen manga ink art, monochrome screentone shading, dramatic speed lines, explosive impact effects, dynamic perspective, polished commercial Japanese manga page","setting":"rocky battlefield or cavern-like wasteland during a monster attack","page":{"reading":"right-to-left manga composition","panel_count":4,"gutter":"clean white borders","sections":[{"title":"top action panel","position":"top","count":1,"labels":["witch casting spell at monster"]},{"title":"reaction panel","position":"upper-middle","count":1,"labels":["close-up with speech balloon"]},{"title":"attack panel","position":"lower-middle","count":1,"labels":["dark projectile rushing toward boy"]},{"title":"bottom dramatic panel","position":"bottom","count":1,"labels":["witch reaching forward and shouting"]}]},"characters":[{"role":"main heroine mage","name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"Noel\"}","appearance":"young woman, slim build, long straight light-colored hair, large expressive eyes, no glasses","outfit":{"count":6,"pieces":["large pointed witch hat with band and oval gem ornament","flowing cape","decorated corset-style top with lacing and filigree trim","short shorts","thigh-high boots","round gem pendant necklace"]},"weapon":"wooden staff with an eye-shaped ornament near the top"},{"role":"secondary character","appearance":"young man with short messy light hair, cloak or scarf around shoulders","placement":"appears at right side of the third panel, facing incoming attack"},{"role":"monster","appearance":"large dragon-like beast with open jaws, rough scales, glowing or intense eyes, aggressive posture"}],"panels":[{"index":1,"composition":"rear three-quarter view of the mage dominating the left side, extending one hand toward the right while holding her staff low in the other hand; a circular magic sigil forms in front of her palm and detonates into a huge white blast colliding with the roaring dragon-like monster on the right; shattered rock, debris, ink splashes, and oversized Japanese sound-effect lettering around the explosion","emotion":"urgent combat"},{"index":2,"composition":"narrow horizontal close-up of the mage's face under the brim of her hat, looking startled with a small sweat drop; speed lines radiate behind her; one vertical speech balloon","text":{"count":1,"items":["あ…！"]},"emotion":"sudden realization"},{"index":3,"composition":"wide horizontal panel showing a black, violent slash or wave-shaped attack tearing across the frame from left toward the boy on the right; heavy motion blur, ink streaks, debris, and large jagged Japanese sound effects emphasize the speed","text":{"count":1,"items":["ザオオオッ"]},"emotion":"imminent danger"},{"index":4,"composition":"large foreshortened close-up of the mage lunging toward the viewer, one hand reaching out desperately, mouth open in a shout, hair and cape blown backward, staff visible to the side; dense speed lines fill the background; large vertical speech balloon on the left","text":{"count":1,"items":["ノエル！ 早くー"]},"emotion":"panic and urgency"}],"tone":"dramatic, tense, heroic fantasy battle scene","rendering_notes":"keep everything strictly grayscale with crisp inked contours, detailed hatching, intense contrast, manga-style Japanese lettering left as-is, and cinematic page flow suitable for a fantasy action comic"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"黑白奇幻漫画页面","style":"高细节青年漫画墨线艺术，单色网点阴影，戏剧性速度线，爆炸冲击效果，动态视角，精美的商业日本漫画页面","setting":"怪物袭击期间的岩石战场或洞穴状荒地","page":{"reading":"从右向左的漫画构图","panel_count":4,"gutter":"干净的白色边框","sections":[{"title":"顶部动作分镜","position":"顶部","count":1,"labels":["女巫向怪物施法"]},{"title":"反应分镜","position":"中上部","count":1,"labels":["带有对话气泡的特写"]},{"title":"攻击分镜","position":"中下部","count":1,"labels":["黑色弹射物冲向男孩"]},{"title":"底部戏剧性分镜","position":"底部","count":1,"labels":["女巫向前伸手呼喊"]}]},"characters":[{"role":"女主角法师","name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"Noel\"}","appearance":"年轻女性，身材苗条，长直浅色头发，大而有神的眼睛，不戴眼镜","outfit":{"count":6,"pieces":["带有饰带和椭圆形宝石装饰的大尖顶女巫帽","飘逸的斗篷","带有系带和花丝装饰的紧身胸衣式上衣","短裤","过膝长靴","圆形宝石吊坠项链"]},"weapon":"木制法杖，顶部有眼状装饰"},{"role":"次要角色","appearance":"短乱浅色头发的年轻男子，肩上披着斗篷或围巾","placement":"出现在第三个分镜的右侧，面对袭来的攻击"},{"role":"怪物","appearance":"巨大的龙形野兽，张着大嘴，鳞片粗糙，眼睛发光或充满戾气，姿态具有攻击性"}],"panels":[{"index":1,"composition":"法师的后四分之三侧面视图占据左侧，一只手向右伸出，另一只手低垂着法杖；一个圆形魔法阵在她掌前形成，并引爆成巨大的白色冲击波，与右侧咆哮的龙形怪物碰撞；爆炸周围有破碎的岩石、碎片、墨迹飞溅和巨大的日文音效文字","emotion":"紧急战斗"},{"index":2,"composition":"狭窄的水平特写，展示了女巫帽檐下的脸庞，神情惊愕，带有一滴汗珠；身后放射出速度线；一个垂直对话气泡","text":{"count":1,"items":["あ…！"]},"emotion":"突然意识到"},{"index":3,"composition":"宽幅水平分镜，展示了一道黑色、猛烈的斩击或波浪状攻击从左侧横穿画面，冲向右侧的男孩；强烈的动态模糊、墨迹线条、碎片和巨大的锯齿状日文音效强调了速度感","text":{"count":1,"items":["ザオオオッ"]},"emotion":"迫在眉睫的危险"},{"index":4,"composition":"大型透视特写，女巫向观众猛冲，一只手绝望地伸出，嘴巴张开大声呼喊，头发和斗篷向后飘动，法杖在侧面可见；密集的背景速度线；左侧有巨大的垂直对话气泡","text":{"count":1,"items":["ノエル！ 早くー"]},"emotion":"恐慌与紧迫感"}],"tone":"戏剧性、紧张、英雄奇幻战斗场景","rendering_notes":"保持严格的灰度，线条清晰，阴影细致，对比强烈，日文漫画字体保持原样，电影般的页面流程适合奇幻动作漫画"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 奇幻漫画战斗页面：一页精细的黑白漫画，展示了一位年轻女巫在绝望的奇幻战斗中奋力拼搏，适合用于生成精致的漫画动作场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, manga, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
